title: Respect reduced motion and touch tap ergonomics globally
description: Add global prefers-reduced-motion handling, touch-action manipulation for mobile interactions, and touch-manipulation classes on primary controls so touch users see less motion and faster taps.

title: Make Files screen usable on narrow mobile viewports
description: Collapse the file tree after selecting a file on small screens and provide a back-to-tree affordance so the editor panel can use the full viewport width.

title: Add CSS-specific responsive smoke assertions
description: Create a lightweight check that validates expected responsive CSS and accessibility media queries because ESLint ignores src/styles.css.

title: Move ad-hoc screenshot artifacts to an ignored report directory
description: Introduce a dedicated ignored visual-smoke output path so viewport PNGs and helper scripts do not remain as root-level untracked noise after UI cycles.

title: Add focused accessibility smoke tests for reduced motion and touch CSS
description: Create a small automated assertion that verifies prefers-reduced-motion and coarse-pointer touch-action rules remain present after CSS refactors.

title: Convert visual-smoke screenshot leftovers into a first-class ignored report flow
description: Move viewport screenshot scripts and PNG output under an ignored auto-improvement report directory so UI cycles can keep useful artifacts without dirtying the workspace root.

title: Reconcile feature/chat-ui-improvements with main
description: Resolve the current divergence so verified auto-improvement commits can merge cleanly instead of remaining local-only deployment commits.
